description_long: This house features a single-story, L-shaped layout with a mix of brick and white exterior walls. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The roof is predominantly flat, with some sections possibly accommodating rooftop utilities or gardens. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, including living areas, bedrooms, and utility spaces, with visible modern furnishings and decor. The property includes a small green yard area and some landscaping with palm trees and shrubs. The main entrance is marked by a prominent door and a small overhang, providing a welcoming entry point.
description: A modern, single-story L-shaped brick house with large windows, flat roof, and landscaped yard. The design features asymmetrical window placement and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a mix of brick and white walls.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the landscaped yard, palm tree, and additional windows along the brick facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white-walled section, more private rooms, and a green yard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the flat roof, window arrangement, and secondary entry points.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small overhang, and minimal decorative elements
